Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigAdvancedFrameMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.ReplicateScan:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.TitleArea, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.DebugHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ReplicateScan, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.Debug:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.DebugHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT")
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationTitleFrameMixin); self.titleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_ADVANCED_CATEGORY; self.subTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_ADVANCED_TEXT; self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_ALTERNATE_SCAN; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_ALTERNATE_SCAN_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_ALTERNATE_SCAN_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_DEBUG; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_DEBUG_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_DEBUG_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
